name: ai-pipeline-kit
description: Run-scoped 7-step AI data analysis pipeline for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run a 7-step data analysis pipeline with dashboards and reports.
interface.longDescription: ai-pipeline-kit gives Codex a run-scoped workflow for profiling source data, EDA, problem definition, KPI design, deep analysis, SVG/HTML dashboard generation, and executive reporting. It records source file paths without copying data and keeps outputs under ~/Documents/data-ai-pipeline/runs/<run_id>/outputs.
defaultPrompt: 이 CSV로 AI 분석 파이프라인 실행해줘
이 분석 결과를 HTML 대시보드로 시각화해줘
